programme.title: Tuesday Report : Crossing Paths Anew - EP 2
programme.desc: Rattan furniture and black-and-gold signboards were once popular choices for new homes or shop openings, shaping a generation of skilled craftsmen. But as choices become more diverse, these traditional crafts are declining. What challenges do they face today? Surprisingly, young artisans still choose to remain in these sunset industries. How are they carving out new paths for these fading crafts?

You could claim a full refund if you do not see results in 30 days.

programme.title: TAJWID CINTA - EP 1
programme.desc: Dafri returns to Indonesia with a joyful heart, ready to get engaged to his girlfriend, Alina. However, his life takes a drastic detour when a girl named Syifa is left stranded at the altar after her own fiancé, Ilham, mysteriously vanishes. Out of an immense debt of gratitude owed to Syifa's family, Dafri's father forces Dafri into an arranged marriage with Syifa instead. Bound to a stranger, the two must navigate a stormy marriage filled with resentment and endless conflicts.

programme.title: Tanpa Kamu Warga Indonesia Kurang Satu
programme.desc: Bian (Kevin Hillers) is thrilled to cross paths with his old friend, Qiara (Larasati Nugroho), only for his heart to shatter when he realizes she cannot see him; Qiara completely lost her sight in a tragic accident. Deeply moved, Bian stays by her side to support her, and the two form an unbreakable bond—even though Qiara already has a boyfriend waiting in the wings.

programme.title: BADAI PASTI BERLALU - EP 27
programme.desc: 20-year-old Sisca travels to Labuan Bajo to heal her broken heart. During her trip, she ends up helping Valen and Helmi, only to discover a painful truth: Valen is pregnant with Dicky's child. Meanwhile, Leo arrives in Labuan Bajo from Jakarta to conduct a social charity mission, crossing paths with Sisca amidst the drama

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 173
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: TOK TOK TOK PAKET JODOH ASYIAPPP
programme.desc: To keep her family financially afloat, Dania secretly participates in dangerous, illegal street races. When her mother uncovers the truth, she fiercely opposes it, terrified that Dania will suffer the same fate as her older brother, who was left paralyzed from a racing accident. Caught between survival and her mother's tears, Dania must find a safer way to make a living

programme.title: OB CANTIK PENCABUT RASA GALAU
programme.desc: Raya's love story is often taken advantage of by her boyfriend for being too much of a pussycat.

programme.title: TAJWID CINTA - EP 1
programme.desc: Dafri returns to Indonesia with a joyful heart, ready to get engaged to his girlfriend, Alina. programme.title: Singkat Padat Langsung Akad
programme.desc: Sadam (Ridho Ilahi) is a dedicated police officer who regularly conducts roadside checkpoints. During a routine traffic stop, he is stunned to pull over Melly (Larasati Nugroho)—his very first love from his past. While Melly is bewildered that Sadam still recognizes her after all these years, the initial confusion quickly sparks a mutual desire to rekindle their long-lost flame.

programme.title: BADAI PASTI BERLALU - EP 27
programme.desc: 20-year-old Sisca travels to Labuan Bajo to heal her broken heart. During her trip, she ends up helping Valen and Helmi, only to discover a painful truth: Valen is pregnant with Dicky's child. Meanwhile, Leo arrives in Labuan Bajo from Jakarta to conduct a social charity mission, crossing paths with Sisca amidst the drama

programme.title: Mohon Doa Restu Yura, Semesta Mendukung
programme.desc: Syifa (Rayna Snova) is fiercely determined to get into her dream university, but her friends relentlessly mock her, claiming she lacks the brains. In the middle of the humiliation, a handsome guy named Bowo (Aditya Zoni) steps in to defend her. Bowo offers to tutor Syifa until she passes the entrance exams, but it comes with a catch: once accepted, Syifa must agree to be his fake girlfriend for three months.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 174
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: VAKSIN EKSTRA HANDSOME PENANGKAL VIRUS KOROSI CINTA
programme.desc: When Andien decides to hire the charming Reza to act as her pretend partner, she sets strict boundaries. But as the lines between performance and reality begin to blur, she faces the ultimate test: can she stop herself from breaking the number one rule and actually falling in love with her rented boyfriend?

programme.title: TAJWID CINTA - EP 2

programme.title: Lengah Dikit Jadi Miss Kambing
programme.desc: Ketrin (Amanda Salmakhira), the wealthy daughter of a goat farm owner, is forced to manage the family business alongside Dika (Hardi Fadhillah), a charming local village youth. It’s love at first sight for Dika, but a messy love triangle erupts when his own older brother, Firman (Yugo Avaero), also sets his sights on winning Ketrin’s heart

programme.title: Naluri Hati - EP 49

programme.title: Onyomat Geset Go - EP 1

programme.title: Kennot Brain - EP 27
programme.desc: Saksikan Alif Farhan & Ain Edruce bersama tetamu jemputan mereka yang pasti kecoh sambil merungkai video-video pelik yang 'trending' pada minggu ini.

programme.title: Isteri VS. Tunang - EP 8
programme.desc: Alana Sofea, seorang gadis yang berterus terang, mencabar ego Zaim Azfar, seorang lelaki yang sombong dan angkuh, lalu membawa mereka ke dalam perkahwinan yang tidak dijangka.

programme.title: Keluarga Iskandar - EP 6

programme.title: Cik Reen Encik Ngok Ngek - EP 19
programme.desc: Azreen dan Harris terpaksa berkahwin apabila adik mereka melarikan diri pada malam sebelum bernikah. Adakah perkahwinan Harris dan Azreen akan berkekalan selepas Roadtrip Misadventures mereka?

programme.title: 3 dara kg.com - EP 11
programme.desc: 3 Dara nak buat bisnes produk kecantikan sendiri menggunakan modal pinjaman dari Tabung JKK Kampung Kembang Kempis. Mereka ditipu oleh Kulup Q , di mana duit dah dibayar tetapi barang tak dapat.

programme.desc: Lebih meriah, lebih kecoh! Saksikan program variasi terbaharu yang menampilkan Dato' AC Mizal beraksi bersama PS Mansur dan tetamu jemputan yang bakal membuat anda tidak kering gusi!

programme.title: The Cadets - EP 3
programme.desc: Mengisahkan perjuangan empat sekawan - Amir, Farah, Hakim dan Liz - untuk membuktikan bahawa pasukan mereka mampu mengatasi segala cabaran untuk mewakili Kadet bomba di Kem Jamboree Kebangsaan.

programme.title: Bas Ria - EP 20
programme.desc: Bas Ria bakal menyaksikan pasukan Bas Ria "memburu" selebriti-selebriti di dalam "hit list" mereka? Untuk apa? Untuk mendapatkan sesuatu yang berharga dari mereka.

programme.title: The Maid - EP 10
programme.desc: Kehidupan Jay dan empat orang isterinya nampak bahagia namun hakikatnya isteri - isterinya saling membenci. Konflik terjadi apabila isteri ke-4 dibunuh. Siapakah pembunuhnya?

programme.title: Cik Misi 123 - EP 26
programme.desc: Mengisahkan tentang seorang gadis, Oya yang terpaksa belajar kursus kejururawatan atas desakan keluarganya. Sewaktu belajar di Kolej, Oya berkenalan dengan seorang jejaka bernama Mika.

programme.title: Split TV Series - EP 11
programme.desc: Maryam akan berkahwin dengan Mikael . Maryam tidak mengetahui Mikael menghidap Dissociative Identity Disorder, satu jasad tujuh personality berbeza di dalamnya.

programme.title: Malaysian Ghost Stories S2 - EP 20
programme.desc: Nusantara merupakan satu daerah yang tebal dengan semangat mistik dan alam ghaib. Setiap episod mempunyai penyelesaian yang unik bergantung kepada jenis gangguan, jenis jin dan kesan ke atas watak utama.

programme.title: Rahsia Hati Perempuan - EP 1
programme.desc: Mikael, Zayn & Ilaina adalah kawan baik semenjak kecil. Ilaina dan keluarga telah berpindah ke Australia. Berputik cinta antara mereka dan siapakah Arissa?

programme.title: DramaVaganza: Dendam Cinta Arissa - EP 16
programme.desc: Perkahwinan Arissa & Zariman musnah apabila Rafeal melanggar Zariman dan melarikan diri untuk mengejar isterinya. Ingin jujur pada Arissa namun Rafeael jatuh cinta dengan Arissa tanpa sengaja.

programme.desc: Devina a newspaper journalist from Lucknow falls in love with Kashi and things go awry when Kashi's sister Ganga goes missing. Release Year: 2018 Director: Dhiraj Kumar

programme.title: Simmba
programme.desc: A corrupt police officer, works for Durva, an influential smuggler. However, his life takes an unusual turn when he decides to avenge a woman who was assaulted by Durva's brothers. Release Year: 2018 Director: Rohit Shetty Awards: 2019 Winner Bollywood BusineSS Award- Highest-GroSSing Actor- Ranveer Singh

programme.title: Mitron
programme.desc: Jai, a happy-go-lucky man, is forced to get married by his father to learn some responsibility. Just then, he meets Avni, an ambitious MBA graduate who wants to start her own business. Release Year: 2018 Director: Nitin Kakkar Awards: 1 nomination

programme.title: Hero No. 1
programme.desc: A wealthy business heir plights his troth to household chores for the sake of love. Posing as Raju, the man of many talents, he sweeps, mops, cooks, sings, and dances his way into the hearts of his girlfriend's near and dear ones. Release Year: 1997 Director: David Dhawan

programme.title: Paltan
programme.desc: Lieutenant Colonel Raj Singh Yadav and his soldiers protect the Nathu La Pass from the Chinese while coping with the pain of being separated from their loved ones. Release Year: 2018 Director: J.P. Dutta Awards: 2019 Nominee Jury's Choice Award- Best Lyricist- Javed Akhtar

programme.desc: A man uses his combat skills to eradicate black money, which has been siphoned to banks abroad.

programme.desc: Basant always gets what he wants and when he falls in love with Priya at first sight, he wants her to be his. Later, he impersonates his friend Vasant, who had saved her life before, to win her over.

programme.desc: Watch behind the scenes and meet the cast and crew of the movie.

programme.desc: This comical spin-off of the 80s comedy programme Goin' Bananas is currently the Philippines' most successful children's comedy show, created and directed by one of Goin' Bananas' original stars, Bobot Mortiz.

programme.title: Linlang
programme.desc: This mystery-thriller series revolves around an alluring woman named Juliana and her illicit affair with Alex, a lawyer who also happens to be the brother of Juliana's husband, Victor, a washed-up boxer. What is the story behind Juliana's betrayal and infidelity?

programme.title: Blood VS. Duty
programme.desc: This action drama series pits government agents against a tight-knit fishing community in a high-stakes battle over illegal firearms.

programme.title: The Alibi
programme.desc: Vincent is accused of killing his rival, Walter. To protect his reputation, he hires Stella, an escort with her own haunted past, to pose as his alibi. What begins as a transactional arrangement soon becomes dangerously real.

programme.title: The Secrets of Hotel 88
programme.desc: The Secrets of Hotel 88 dives into a gripping story of the estranged Fernandez brothers - Martin, Gio and Kiko - who unexpectedly inherit Hotel 88 following their father's death. Driven by conflicting motives, the three find themselves locked in escalating tension and a brewing family feud.

programme.title: Incognito
programme.desc: A group of disgraced yet highly-skilled operatives hope to seek redemption as they take on dangerous covert missions and fight against the enemy they unwittingly uncovered.

programme.desc: An undercover agent goes on a dangerous mission to bring down a crime ring. Fuelled by a bitter and painful past, Apollo and his allies face the gruelling task that will challenge his resolve and strength.

programme.title: Festa Major
programme.desc: In a village in the Pyrenees-Orientales, a ritual that has lasted for a hundred years takes place every year at the end of summer: a large popular celebration spread over five days. The camera films this ode to joy, lightness and sharing like a timeless tableau.

programme.desc: The only son of Tamil parents, 13-year-old Anushan much prefers rap to his native culture. When his uncle arrives from Sri Lanka, he finds himself sharing his room and his daily life with him for a few days.

programme.desc: Disabled following a work accident, Yara spends his time at home assembling miniature models, under the reproaches of his wife. Drug traffickers have also chosen him to secretly guard their loot. Until the day when some disturbing delivery men show up at his door.

programme.title: Lakay Nou - EP 5
programme.desc: To finish renovating the restaurant as quickly as possible, Henri calls on Father Moses for his help. But a discovery made during the work forces both Myrlande and Henri to react quickly.

programme.title: Lakay Nou - EP 6
programme.desc: Henri seeks the approval of his parents-in-law and organises a tasting dinner for them to test his future menu. Meanwhile Myrlande decides to spoil herself with the bonus offered by her boss.

programme.title: Lakay Nou - EP 7
programme.desc: Henri hopes that everything will be perfect for the official opening of his restaurant whilst Judeline wants to use the event as an opportunity to make an important announcement.

programme.title: Lakay Nou - EP 8
programme.desc: The family takes part in a television documentary that is supposed to promote the restaurant. Unfortunately, the journalist seems to have a different agenda...

programme.title: Movie - Kodi
programme.desc: Twins Kodi and Anbu have different personalities: while one is into politics, the other is a pacifist. But a twist in their fates causes one to adopt the other's life and seek revenge.

programme.title: Movie - Kathavarayan
programme.desc: Kathavarayan, an illegal liquor dealer, faces trouble when a student, who vows to expose those who flout the law, gets him arrested.

programme.title: Movie - Pattam Parakkattum
programme.desc: Thyagu, a poor graduate, tries to get work to treat his father's visual disability. He falls in love with his neighbour, but her parents are not keen on her marriage since her salary is dearer to them.

programme.title: Movie - Pavalakodi
programme.desc: In school, Shiva never disclosed his love for Paval. Seven year later, he hires Robert to find her. Robert falls in love with Paval and lies to Shiva that she is now a fat, unmarried mother of three.

programme.title: Fillers
programme.desc: KTV HD presents you round-the-clock Kollywood movies, from the latest blockbusters to classics of the yesteryear!

programme.title: Movie - Deiva Vaakku
programme.desc: Hamsaveni's divine power earns her respect among the villagers, whereas her brother Vallatharai tries to exploit her power for his personal gain. He goes to the extent of sabotaging her marriage.

programme.title: Movie - Gol Mall
programme.desc: Ganesh, a young man, falls in love with Aishwarya, whose father is a strict man and does not approve of their union. Ganesh plans to get himself and Aishwarya kidnapped with the help of his friends.

programme.title: Movie - Shankar Guru
programme.desc: Shankar Guru, an honest man, fights for the rights of poor people. When Seeta falls in love with him, a few gangsters try to attack her to teach Shankar a lesson.

programme.title: Movie - Uttama Purushan
programme.desc: Raghu, a married man, tries to have an extra-marital affair with his secretary and asks her to come to a hotel room. However, he gets accused of murdering a woman who stayed in the neighbouring room.

programme.title: Movie - Thalaivaa
programme.desc: Vishwa runs a small business in Sydney, unaware that his father is a gangster in Mumbai. When his father is killed by a rival, Vishwa takes over his crime syndicate, with revenge on his mind.

programme.title: Movie - Dhinandhorum
programme.desc: Dhinamdhorum is a 1998 Tamil language film directed by Nagaraj. The film features Murali and Suvalakshmi in the lead roles, while Manivannan and Renuka play other supporting roles. The film, which has music by Oviyan, released in February 1998

programme.title: Movie - Pengal
programme.desc: Pengal is a Tamil feature film starring Akash & others

programme.title: Movie - Pesadha Kannum Pesume
programme.desc: Vikram, a habitual prankster, decides to play a prank on Shweta, his lover. When all fails, he pretends to be married to Priya. His trick backfires when Priya begins to insist she is indeed his wife.

programme.title: Fillers
programme.desc: Fillers

programme.title: Movie - En aasa Raasave
programme.desc: When a young boy, who works as a street dancer, finds out that his mother is alive, he decides to locate her and struggles to reunite his separated parents.

programme.title: Movie - Ramachandra
programme.desc: Due To His Honesty And Refusal To Meet The Demands Of Those In Power, Inspector Ramachandran Is Often Transferred From One Town To Another. Soon, He Finds Himself In An Area That Is Highly Terrorised.

programme.title: Movie - Thangathin Thangam
programme.desc: A young village leader falls in love with a girl assuming that she is a villager. However, his life takes a turn when he comes to know that she is from a very rich family and a friend of his enemy.

programme.title: Movie - Kaadhal Parisu
programme.desc: Sisters Malini and Chitra are heirs to a huge fortune. Chitra is in for a shock when she introduces her boyfriend to Malini and the latter accuses him of raping her years ago.

programme.title: Movie - Em Mahan
programme.desc: A man, who is popular for his strictness in his village, treats his son badly. The son wants to marry his childhood friend but his parents and the girl's parents are at loggerheads, making it tough for him to marry her.

programme.title: PGA Tour 2026
programme.desc: The Canadian Open is a professional golf tournament in Canada. It is co-organized by Golf Canada and the PGA Tour. It was first played 121 years ago in 1904, and has been held annually since then, except for during World War I, World War II and the COVID-19 pandemic. It is the third oldest continuously running tournament on the tour, after The Open Championship and the U.S. Open.

programme.title: REVIEW OF THE SEASON - 2025/2026 (ARS)
programme.desc: As we wave goodbye to another action-packed and compelling Premier League campaign, Review of the Season takes you through the twists and turns of a gripping last 10 months. From how the title was won, the fight for European spots, and the battle to avoid relegation - all the key moments are covered from another scintillating season.

programme.title: GOALS OF THE SEASON - 2025/2026 (HAALAND)
programme.desc: From free-kicks to solo runs, scissor kicks to 30-yard screamers, Goals of the Season revisits some of the most memorable strikes from the 25/26 campaign, whilst paying homage to the Golden Boot winner.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 47
programme.desc: We celebrate the rise of Norwegian striking power in the Premier League, exploring how a golden generation in the late 1990s; featuring pioneers like Ole Gunnar Solskjær and Tore Andre Flo helped shatter stereotypes and establish Norway as an unlikely breeding ground for elite forwards.

programme.title: PL BEST OF... PREMIER LEAGUE SCANDINAVIAN STARS
programme.desc: An hour dedicated to the finest Scandinavian football legends, including Peter Schmeichel, Tore Andre Flo, Eidur Guðjohnsen, Freddie Ljungberg, Antti Niemi and more.

programme.title: PL MASTERCLASS - EP 1
programme.desc: Some of the Premier League's biggest stars take us onto the pitch to discuss the techniques and thought processes that allow them to perform at the highest level. Featuring Dan Burn, Dominik Szoboszlai, Ollie Watkins and Leeds United set pieces.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 2
programme.desc: Ahead of the World Cup, we revisit the rise of current USA manager Mauricio Pochettino's unforgettable Tottenham Hotspur side; the team that transformed Spurs from top-four hopefuls into genuine challengers at home and in Europe. Playing fearless, high-intensity football and built around a young core of stars, Pochettino's Spurs came within touching distance of Premier League and Champions League glory, creating some of the club's greatest modern nights along the way.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 1
programme.desc: We sit down with Lee Bowyer to look back on the career of one of the Premier League's fiercest and most competitive midfielders. From his rise at Charlton to becoming a key figure in the brilliant Leeds United side that challenged Europe's elite and reached the Champions League semi-finals, Bowyer reflects on the highs, controversies and defining moments of his career, including spells with West Ham, Newcastle and Birmingham.

programme.title: REVIEW OF THE SEASON - 2025/2026 (ARS)
programme.desc: As we wave goodbye to another action-packed and compelling Premier League campaign, Review of the Season takes you through the twists and turns of a gripping last 10 months. From how the title was won, the fight for European spots, and the battle to avoid relegation - all the key moments are covered from another scintillating season.

programme.title: PL WORLD BEATERS - EP 4
programme.desc: A strand that heroes the Premier League stars who could play leading roles for their national teams competing in the FIFA World Cup 2026 this summer. Through wide-ranging interview, these films tell each player's individual story, their journey to stardom and the impact they could make for their nations on the world's biggest stage. Featuring Declan Rice, Tyler Adams, Moises Caicedo and Virgil van Dijk.

programme.title: PL BEST OF... PREMIER LEAGUE SCANDINAVIAN STARS
programme.desc: An hour dedicated to the finest Scandinavian football legends, including Peter Schmeichel, Tore Andre Flo, Eidur Guðjohnsen, Freddie Ljungberg, Antti Niemi and more.

programme.title: PL WORLD BEATERS - EP 5
programme.desc: A strand that heroes the Premier League stars who could play leading roles for their national teams competing in the FIFA World Cup 2026 this summer. Through wide-ranging interview, these films tell each player's individual story, their journey to stardom and the impact they could make for their nations on the world's biggest stage. Featuring Rodri, Viktor Gyökeres, Chris Wood and Daniel Munoz.

programme.title: REVIEW - MON 20 OCT
programme.desc: Review covers all the action from Matchweek 8, starting with the early kick-off between Nottingham Forest and Chelsea, moving on to Fulham's home clash with Arsenal at Craven Cottage, and concluding with the weekend's headline fixture: Liverpool versus Manchester United.

programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW - EP 40
programme.desc: Tyler Adams' story is one of dedication, commitment and sacrifice. From the early days when his mother would drive him hundreds of miles to training to pursue a dream, to the influence of his stepfather and three brothers, Adams' journey from MLS prospect to Premier League star has been a fascinating one.

programme.title: PL REWIND - EP 2
programme.desc: Tim Howard spent a decade as Everton's first choice goalkeeper, the club that defined his Premier League career. The American recalls his journey from New Jersey, via Old Trafford, to Goodison Park, and his most memorable moments between the posts.

programme.title: NETBUSTERS - ERLING HAALAND'S 100

programme.title: PL GOATS - EP 3
programme.desc: No Australian has made more Premier League appearances than Mark Schwarzer, so who better to decide on the true Australian GOAT from those who have made the journey from Down Under to the Premier League.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 49
programme.desc: We join Harry Kewell in Vietnam as he embraces a new chapter in coaching, reflecting on a career that took him from prodigious talent to Premier League star. Kewell revisits his electrifying rise at Leeds United, before confronting the intense scrutiny and expectation that came with his move to Liverpool and then Galatasaray. He opens up about the injuries, pressure, and moments at Anfield that nearly drove him away from the game altogether.

From how the title was won, the fight for European spots, and the battle to avoid relegation - all the key moments are covered from another scintillating season.

programme.title: PL MASTERCLASS - EP 1
programme.desc: Some of the Premier League's biggest stars take us onto the pitch to discuss the techniques and thought processes that allow them to perform at the highest level. Featuring Dan Burn, Dominik Szoboszlai, Ollie Watkins and Leeds United set pieces.

programme.title: PL WORLD BEATERS - EP 3
programme.desc: A strand that heroes the Premier League stars who could play leading roles for their national teams competing in the FIFA World Cup 2026 this summer. Through wide-ranging interview, these films tell each player's individual story, their journey to stardom and the impact they could make for their nations on the world's biggest stage. Featuring Bruno Fernandes, William Saliba, Jeremy Doku and Alexis Mac Allister.

programme.title: PL GOATS - EP 3
programme.desc: No Australian has made more Premier League appearances than Mark Schwarzer, so who better to decide on the true Australian GOAT from those who have made the journey from Down Under to the Premier League.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 49
programme.desc: We join Harry Kewell in Vietnam as he embraces a new chapter in coaching, reflecting on a career that took him from prodigious talent to Premier League star. Kewell revisits his electrifying rise at Leeds United, before confronting the intense scrutiny and expectation that came with his move to Liverpool and then Galatasaray. He opens up about the injuries, pressure, and moments at Anfield that nearly drove him away from the game altogether. Now, far from the spotlight, we see a different side o

programme.title: PL WORLD BEATERS - EP 2
programme.desc: A strand that heroes the Premier League stars who could play leading roles for their national teams competing in the FIFA World Cup 2026 this summer. Through wide-ranging interview, these films tell each player's individual story, their journey to stardom and the impact they could make for their nations on the world's biggest stage. Featuring Erling Haaland, Iliman Ndiaye, Raúl Jimenez and Amad.

programme.title: NETBUSTERS - ERLING HAALAND'S 100
programme.desc: We celebrate Erling Haaland's record-breaking haul in true Netbusters' style, showcasing every one of his 100 Premier League goals, squeezed into a special 26-minute show.

programme.title: GOALS OF THE SEASON - 2025/2026 (HAALAND)
programme.desc: From free-kicks to solo runs, scissor kicks to 30-yard screamers, Goals of the Season revisits some of the most memorable strikes from the 25/26 campaign, whilst paying homage to the Golden Boot winner.

programme.title: REVIEW - MON 20 OCT
programme.desc: Review covers all the action from Matchweek 8, starting with the early kick-off between Nottingham Forest and Chelsea, moving on to Fulham's home clash with Arsenal at Craven Cottage, and concluding with the weekend's headline fixture: Liverpool versus Manchester United.

programme.title: PL WORLD BEATERS - EP 4
programme.desc: A strand that heroes the Premier League stars who could play leading roles for their national teams competing in the FIFA World Cup 2026 this summer. Through wide-ranging interview, these films tell each player's individual story, their journey to stardom and the impact they could make for their nations on the world's biggest stage. Featuring Declan Rice, Tyler Adams, Moises Caicedo and Virgil van Dijk.

programme.title: PL WORLD BEATERS - EP 5
programme.desc: A strand that heroes the Premier League stars who could play leading roles for their national teams competing in the FIFA World Cup 2026 this summer. Through wide-ranging interview, these films tell each player's individual story, their journey to stardom and the impact they could make for their nations on the world's biggest stage. Featuring Rodri, Viktor Gyökeres, Chris Wood and Daniel Munoz.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 47
programme.desc: We celebrate the rise of Norwegian striking power in the Premier League, exploring how a golden generation in the late 1990s; featuring pioneers like Ole Gunnar Solskjær and Tore Andre Flo helped shatter stereotypes and establish Norway as an unlikely breeding ground for elite forwards. Set against the backdrop of a physically demanding homeland that forged resilience and a relentless mentality, the story also weaves in the presence of Alf-Inge Haaland during that same era, creating a generation

programme.title: PL BEST OF... PREMIER LEAGUE SCANDINAVIAN STARS
programme.desc: An hour dedicated to the finest Scandinavian football legends, including Peter Schmeichel, Tore Andre Flo, Eidur Guðjohnsen, Freddie Ljungberg, Antti Niemi and more.

programme.title: GOALS OF THE SEASON - 2025/2026 (HAALAND)
programme.desc: From free-kicks to solo runs, scissor kicks to 30-yard screamers, Goals of the Season revisits some of the most memorable strikes from the 25/26 campaign, whilst paying homage to the Golden Boot winner.

programme.title: FIGHT SPORTS MMA Amanda Lino vs. Rizlen Zouak
programme.desc: This episode features a women's banthamweight championship as Amanda 'Mad Dog' Lino and Rizlen 'The Lioness of the Atlas' Zouak fight their way to Fight of the Night honors. Bonus coverage showcases more striking power with Mzawandile Hlongwa vs. Robert Swanepoel and Steve Nwosu vs. Quinton Rossouw. From EFC 70 in Sibaya Casino, Durbin, South Africa on 26-May-2018.

programme.title: MEGA Fights In 60 Edison Miranda vs. Willie Gibbs
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features Super Middleweights Edison Miranda (26-2, 23 KOs) vs. Willie 'The Gladiator' Gibbs (20-1, 16 KOs) from the Miccosukee Indian Gaming Resort in Miami, Florida, USA. Bonus coverage includes Jason Litzau, aka 'The American Boy' (20-1, 18 KOs) vs. Jose Hernandez (21-3, 13 KOs).

programme.title: MEGA Fights In 60 Jermain Taylor vs. Jeff Lacy
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features former Middleweight Champion Jermain 'Bad Intentions' Taylor (27-2, 17 KOs) in a back and forth battle with Jeff "Left Hook' Lacy (24-1, 17 KOs) in a WBC Super Middleweight Title Eliminator on November 15, 2008 from the Vanderbilt University Memorial Gymnasium in Nashville, Tennessee, USA.

programme.title: Fight Quest
programme.desc: Episode 2: Denfeng, China - Hosts Jimmy Smith and Doug Anderson learn the Fight Discipline of Wushu and Sanda and the Martial Art of Hands, Feet and Breaking with Masters Shi DeYang and Shi De Cheng.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Juan Manuel Marquez vs. Michael Katsidis
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is a highly-praised and hard-hitting lightweight championship fight featuring Juan Manuel Marquez and Michael Katsidis that was named HBO's 2010 Fight of the Year. Also on the card, welterweight champion Victor Ortiz.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo
programme.desc: For the first time the top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. This new format presents Sumo in an authentic, in-depth and entertaining way covering the rules, ranks, match-ups, and more. Episode 5 from from Ryogoku Kokugikan in Tokyo, Japan features Shodai, Takayasu, Tobizaru and Takakeisho.

programme.title: Wide World of Fights Saul (Canelo) Alvarez vs. Kermit Cintron
programme.desc: This episode features Saul (Canelo) Alvarez defending the WBC light middleweight title against Kermit Cintron, as well as kickboxing, sumo and more!

programme.title: Bipolar Rock n' Roller
programme.desc: A raw and unflinching account of Mauro Ranallo's decades-long struggle with Bipolar Affective Disorder. The voice of WWE and Showtime Championship Boxing, Ranallo has called some of the biggest sports events in history - all the while fighting his own epic battles with mental health Follow his journey in this 3-part series, as he combats the stigma behind mental health issues and sheds light on what it's like being at the top of the industry despite seemingly insurmountable odds.

programme.title: FIGHT SPORTS MMA Amanda Lino vs. Rizlen Zouak

programme.title: MEGA Fights Edwin Rodriguez vs. Jason Escalera
programme.desc: This episode features a USBA super middleweight title bout that sees Edwin Rodriguez defend against the undefeated Jason Escalera.

programme.title: BWF Martial Arts
programme.desc: This episode features highlights from the Men's Forms Championship at the ISKA US Open Championships held at Disney World, Orlando, FL, USA.

programme.title: Judo for the World
programme.desc: Judo for the World features the best competitors in the sport as they compete in a global tour for an opportunity to vie for the gold in the World Judo Championship. In this episode, we see the best of the Judo Grand Slam from Baku and the #2 world ranked fighter, Michael Korrell, talks judo.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Andre Berto vs. Freddy Hernandez
programme.desc: The main event in this episode sees Andre Berto defend the WBC welterweight championship against Freddy Hernandez. With one quick, hard right hand to the face in the first round, this bout comes to a sudden halt. Berto looks to keep his undefeated streak alive and thrust himself into talks for bigger fights with the likes of stars such as Floyd Mayweather. Also on the card, Jean Pascal looks for an upset in the light heavyweight division.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo
programme.desc: For the first time the top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. This new format presents Sumo in an authentic, in-depth and entertaining way covering the rules, ranks, match-ups, and more. Episode 1 from Ryogoku Kokugikan in Tokyo, Japan features Takakeisho, Onosho, Kotoshoho and Daieisho.

programme.title: Wide World of Fights Victor Ortiz vs. Marcos Rene Maidana
programme.desc: This episode features a Super Lightweight bloody battle between Marcos Rene Maidana making his US debut and a very young Victor Ortiz, as well as kickboxing, sumo and more!

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo

programme.title: Teletubbies S01 - EP 66
programme.desc: The Teletubbies are about to go on the Tubby Custard Ride with the hat, bag, ball and scooter when they realise there is not enough room. The Noo-­Noo looks after their things.

programme.title: Yakka Dee S05 - EP 20
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say `snow', and goes on a whirlwind word adventure. They see lots of snow, cold snow, falling snow, twinkly snow and yummy snow. There's sparkly snow and sledging snow, and Dee and Penguin have fun throwing snow.

programme.title: Messy goes to OKIDO S03 - EP 24
programme.desc: When Mayor Oki wants to build a new tower, Messy is keen to help. There is just one problem - all his towers fall over...

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops S01 - EP 37
programme.desc: Mojo and Bo need Ted's help to pull a wobbly duck statue up Swoppiton Hill. But does Ted know the best way? And will there be anything left of the duck when they get there?

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 37
programme.desc: The Heelers and Lucky's family get together to watch the big game, a fun family experiences that gets a little tense.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 36
programme.desc: Judo desperately wants to play in the dirt with Bluey and Bingo, but she is not supposed to get herself dirty.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S05 - EP 11
programme.desc: The Squirrels find Duggee's cheerleader pompoms, so he shows them his old moves. Time to practice: Duggee at the chess board, the Squirrels as a squad. There's a big match ahead...

programme.title: Hey Duggee S05 - EP 10
programme.desc: It's a lovely day, so everyone is playing outside. Things take a turn when Roly needs a wee, because the door is locked and Duggee has mislaid the key. The Squirrels start looking around for it, but they have no luck. Not to worry, Duggee has his metal detector, Helen. After demonstrating it to the Squirrels, they are very keen to give it a go.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 19
programme.desc: More fun with Duggee, biscuits, eggs, toys and of course milkshakes.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 18
programme.desc: The Squirrel club play games involving animals. The chickens do some rhythmic office work.

programme.title: Go Jetters S01 - EP 12
programme.desc: The Go Jetters race to fix the Leaning Tower of Pisa, but has it really been glitched?

programme.title: Bluey S01 - EP 31
programme.desc: In a game of 'Work', Dad hires Bluey and Bingo at his drainpipe factory. But when Bluey takes charge, Dad finds his new boss pretty tough, especially her no dancing rule.

programme.title: Bluey S02 - EP 34
programme.desc: In the park Bluey meets a new playmate Winnie, but when Bluey wants to invite her and her dad home for breakfast, she learns that adults take a little bit longer to make friends.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 2
programme.desc: Mum sets up a backyard obstacle course just for fun, but Dad wants to race! Now the kids are determined to win by any means necessary.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 3
programme.desc: Bluey keeps breaking her promises! But after seeing how much Bingo trusts Mum's word, Bluey learns the power of promises and why it's important not to break them.

programme.title: Andy's Safari Adventures S01 - EP 25
programme.desc: When Mr Hammond tasks Andy with making sure the marine iguanas are clean for their inspection, Andy isn't sure what they need in order to do just that. Jetting off in his Safari Mobile, he heads to the Galapagos Islands in search of the answer.

programme.title: Playtime Towers S01 - EP 6
programme.desc: Bella and Lift visit the Fortress of Fun, where Kingsley and Queenie have fun looking for peas with the Playtimers in their Pea Party game.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S03 - EP 6
programme.desc: Duggee and the Squirrels go on an adventure to find a famously shy creature called The Snard who doesn't like noise time to earn their Being Quiet badges!

programme.title: Hey Duggee S03 - EP 5
programme.desc: A weather warning from Duggee's barometer leads the Squirrels to round up all the creatures they can find outside and pile into the clubhouse for an impromptu party.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S03 - EP 4
programme.desc: The Squirrels meet a chameleon called Cosey and learn about how to blend into their surroundings, earning their Camouflage Badges in the process!

programme.title: Go Jetters S03 - EP 17
programme.desc: Ubercorn and Glitch head to the Svalbard Global Seed Vault. But, just like when they were cadets together, the two of them get into trouble. Glitch accidentally crashes the Grimbler into the vault.

programme.title: Go Jetters S03 - EP 16
programme.desc: With the help of his hero Ron Allum, Lars plans to dive to the bottom of the Mariana Trench in a submersible called the Deep Sea Challenger. Glitch plans to beat him there by sending a Grimbot in his Grimsub, but it can't withstand the heavy pressure of the water. Lars and Xuli must work together to mount a rescue operation at the bottom of the sea.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends S23 - EP 7
programme.desc: While working on the Brazilian Railway, Thomas Meets Gustavo, another big blue engine who reminds him of Gordon back home.

programme.title: Sarah and Duck S03 - EP 16
programme.desc: After a night of strong rain, the Shallots set sail on a seafaring adventure.

programme.title: Sarah and Duck S03 - EP 17
programme.desc: Cake decides to teach Sarah and Duck how to decorate with icing!

programme.title: Stan Can S01 - EP 18
programme.desc: The cicrus bus has broken down, but the children are waiting for a circus show! Can Stanley help out?

programme.title: Stan Can S01 - EP 17
programme.desc: Stanley has to free Myrtle, who is stuck, using his new tunnelling mole machine so she can attend the schools tree planting day.

programme.title: Funny Talking Animals S01 - EP 2
programme.desc: From tickles and piggybacks to no longer being able to do cartwheels, grandparents are brilliant!

programme.title: JoJo & Gran Gran S01 - EP 38
programme.desc: When Neil the postie delivers Gran Gran's mail early in the morning, JoJo is amazed to discover that some grown-ups go to work when she's asleep. JoJo and Gran Gran spend the day learning all about night-time workers.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 32
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo hide under the house and spy on two mysterious tradies working in the backyard, wondering what they're up to.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 33
programme.desc: Muffin is playing Grouchy Granny at a garage sale, making Dad push her on an old mobility scooter, but when a real Grouchy Granny wants to buy it, Muffin won't budge.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 34
programme.desc: Mackenzie, Jack and Rusty are playing as astronauts on a mission to Mars, but during their journey, Mackenzie keeps going missing and no one knows why, not even Mackenzie.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S03 - EP 34
programme.desc: Duggee is reading the Squirrels one of his favourite comics. They eagerly want to know the ending, but the comic was discontinued. Luckily Duggee has the comic badge, he can show the Squirrels how to create their own ending.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S03 - EP 33
programme.desc: Duggee has a job to do outside of the Clubhouse. But who will look after the Squirrels? King Tiger of course, he has his Babysitting Badge. But then the Squirrels end up babysitting King Tiger!

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 24
programme.desc: Duggee looks all around, but can he find the Squirrels? Let’s play Hide and Seek!

programme.title: Go Jetters S03 - EP 47
programme.desc: The Go Jetters learn about 'symbiosis' - when two different animals or plants help each other.

programme.title: Roots & Fruits S01 - EP 6
programme.desc: Live from the Roots and Fruits theatre, it's Pumpkin demonstrating incredible strength and attempting to break a Roots and Fruits record.

programme.title: Roots & Fruits S01 - EP 5
programme.desc: Live from the Roots and Fruits Theatre, it's Banana revealing an astonishing secret about herself in the opera piece, I've Got a Secret.

programme.title: Supertato S01 - EP 5
programme.desc: Supertato is determined to rescue Tomato's precious jewel after Evil Pea steals it.

programme.title: Supertato S01 - EP 6
programme.desc: Evil Pea swaps Supertato's Tato-Belt with her own evil Baddie-Belt.

programme.title: Teletubbies S01 - EP 67
programme.desc: The Teletubbies enjoy doing 'Round and Round the Garden', especially the end of the rhyme where they all tickle each other. The Tiddlytubbies have tickly fun too.

programme.title: Yakka Dee S06 - EP 1
programme.desc: In this episode, Dee encourages a friend to say 'dinosaur', and we go on a whirlwind word adventure. We see lots of dinosaurs - big, baby and scaly ones. There's a stomping dinosaur, a running dinosaur, a disco dinosaur, and even a drumming dinosaur! programme.desc: Andy jets off in his safari-mobile to South America in search of an armadillo. He needs to photograph one for the front cover of a new magazine, but try as he might, it continually eludes him. Along the way, he meets a Mara and two squabbling Guanaco.

programme.title: Playtime Towers S01 - EP 7
programme.desc: Bella plays funny games with Lift using her colourful towel. Together, they visit Hettie in the Ice Disco, who uses a big towel to make up a new dance - the Butterfly Boogie!

programme.title: Hey Duggee S03 - EP 7
programme.desc: Duggee arranges for the Squirrels to write to some pen pals, helping them to learn all about life in far away places, earning their Pen Pal badges and making some new friends in the process!

programme.title: Hey Duggee S03 - EP 6
programme.desc: Duggee and the Squirrels go on an adventure to find a famously shy creature called The Snard who doesn't like noise time to earn their Being Quiet badges!

programme.title: Hey Duggee S03 - EP 5
programme.desc: A weather warning from Duggee's barometer leads the Squirrels to round up all the creatures they can find outside and pile into the clubhouse for an impromptu party.

programme.title: Go Jetters S03 - EP 18
programme.desc: In Istanbul's Grand Bazaar, Glitch wishes he could buy everything. Hearing about the wishes granted by the Hen's Eye Column in an underground water store, the Basilica Cistern, Glitch heads beneath the earth and brings the entire cistern close to collapse!

programme.title: Go Jetters S03 - EP 17
programme.desc: Ubercorn and Glitch head to the Svalbard Global Seed Vault. But, just like when they were cadets together, the two of them get into trouble. Glitch accidentally crashes the Grimbler into the vault.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends S23 - EP 8
programme.desc: While working on the Brazilian Railway, Thomas and Gabriela get ready for the Batucada carnival at the docks.

programme.title: Sarah and Duck S03 - EP 17
programme.desc: Cake decides to teach Sarah and Duck how to decorate with icing!

programme.title: Sarah and Duck S03 - EP 18
programme.desc: Sarah's hat goes on an adventure without her, on top of a balloon.

programme.title: Stan Can S01 - EP 19
programme.desc: Stanley goes to help Myrtle, who has found a paint smudge on the Town Hall's door!

programme.title: Stan Can S01 - EP 18
programme.desc: The cicrus bus has broken down, but the children are waiting for a circus show! Can Stanley help out?

programme.title: Funny Talking Animals S01 - EP 3
programme.desc: From astronauts to acrobats, the animals talk about all the things they want to be when they grow up.

programme.title: JoJo & Gran Gran S01 - EP 39
programme.desc: JoJo and Gran Gran are drinking hot chocolate in the park café when a robin lands on their table. JoJo learns that some birds fly away in the winter - that's called migration.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 33
programme.desc: Muffin is playing Grouchy Granny at a garage sale, making Dad push her on an old mobility scooter, but when a real Grouchy Granny wants to buy it, Muffin won't budge.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 34
programme.desc: Mackenzie, Jack and Rusty are playing as astronauts on a mission to Mars, but during their journey, Mackenzie keeps going missing and no one knows why, not even Mackenzie.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 35
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo want Dad all to themselves and will not let Mum have a smoochy kiss. They try to hide him all around the house, but Mum is desperate to spend a little romance time with her husband.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S03 - EP 35
programme.desc: Roly has lost his best potato but Duggee finds it using his sense of smell. But what is a sense? Time for the Squirrels to learn about the five senses and earn their Senses Badge.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S03 - EP 34
programme.desc: Duggee is reading the Squirrels one of his favourite comics. They eagerly want to know the ending, but the comic was discontinued. Luckily Duggee has the comic badge, he can show the Squirrels how to create their own ending.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 25
programme.desc: The Super Squirrels are called to action! Time to stop Dr Catastrophe and save their toys!

programme.title: Go Jetters S03 - EP 48
programme.desc: The Westman Islands south of Iceland are home to one of the largest colonies of puffins in the world! Once a year puffins return to the land to lay a single egg and they often make their nests in underground burrows.

programme.title: Roots & Fruits S01 - EP 7
programme.desc: Live from the Roots and Fruits theatre, it's Cucumber performing Cool Under Pressure while trying to not let any obstacle ruin her calm routine.

programme.title: Roots & Fruits S01 - EP 6
programme.desc: Live from the Roots and Fruits theatre, it's Pumpkin demonstrating incredible strength and attempting to break a Roots and Fruits record.

programme.title: Supertato S01 - EP 6
programme.desc: Evil Pea swaps Supertato's Tato-Belt with her own evil Baddie-Belt.

programme.title: Supertato S01 - EP 7
programme.desc: Chilli becomes Super Chilli as he tries to be a superhero just like Supertato.

programme.title: Teletubbies S01 - EP 68
programme.desc: The Teletubbies travel by Tubby Car to the Hidey Hup where they all spin around on the Tubby Spinny.

programme.title: Yakka Dee S06 - EP 2
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say 'umbrella', and we go on a whirlwind word adventure. We see lots of different types of umbrella - rainy, sunny and even dancing ones! Dee and a friend have frog umbrellas, and we even meet a Cinderella umbrella. The journey is repeated with some special surprises along the way, and everyone has a boogie when Dee's friend finally succeeds in saying today's word!

programme.title: Messy goes to OKIDO S03 - EP 26
programme.desc: It's the day of Mayor Oki's Ice Skate Skate-tacular. But there is too much ice, and it's stopping everyone from getting to the show! Messy must find a way to melt the ice and save the show.

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops S01 - EP 39
programme.desc: A camping trip with Preston goes very wrong when he won't let them use Mojo's tops. But camping Preston's way soon starts a fire. It's Mojo and Bo to the rescue!

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 39
programme.desc: Dad thinks he needs to do some exercise, but Bingo pretends to be Boss Bluey's new employee in the middle of Dad's backyard workout.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 38
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo build a very special cubby for their stuffed toy Kimjim.

programme.desc: The Squirrels haven't been making good choices round the messy clubhouse. With Duggee's help, they start to get it right. But not before sending Roly's imagination into overdrive!

programme.title: Hey Duggee S05 - EP 12

programme.desc: Duggie chooses a key and his blue digger to dig up a big bone. The chipmunk makes a delivery to the squirrels.

programme.desc: When Duggee finds some seeds it's time for some gardening!

programme.title: Ride n' Seek Philippines With Jaime Dempsey (S1) - EP 1
programme.desc: Jaime finds her way barred by the deadly volcano Mount Mayon. As she travels around it, she meets locals who challenge her with Bicol's spicy food, not knowing that her spice tolerance is remarkably high.

programme.desc: Amanda and Alan divide and conquer as they renovate the bathrooms. Amanda has big plans for converting one of the medieval tower rooms into a double height sumptuous en-suite complete with a Botticelli mural, roll-top bath and a gold resin floor, while Alan has the challenging task of transforming the small portaloo-sized bathroom into a minimalist wet room.

programme.title: Amanda and Alan's Italian Job S02 - EP 6

programme.desc: Actor Heather Mitchell's life has been as dramatic off screen as it has on. And she's channelling those experiences into some of the greatest performances of her career.

programme.title: Creative Types With Virginia Trioli
programme.desc: ABC Australia delivers a mix of programmes including news and current affairs, sports, comedies, drama, documentaries, education and award-winning children's programmes.

programme.title: If You're Listening - Black Swans (2026) - EP 2
programme.desc: In the 1950s three quarters of Australians were homeowners. Nowadays, house prices have sky rocketed and younger generations largely feel locked out. So where did it all go wrong?

programme.title: Planet America (2026) - EP 20
programme.desc: President Trump turns 80 as the White House plays host to a UFC Freedom 250 event on the South Lawn, while the nation co-hosts the FIFA World Cup with neighbours Canada and Mexico. Chas and John discuss the latest.

programme.title: Yakka: Australia At Work S1 - EP 2
programme.desc: How Australia was transformed from an agricultural economy into a manufacturing one and how this workplace revolution ended 40 years later amidst public acrimony, inflation, an oil crisis and the rise of the Free Market.

programme.title: The World (2026) - EP 93
programme.desc: There's never been a more important time to stay in touch with what's happening in our world. Girish Sawlani presents the latest international news from ABC News correspondents as well as interviews with experts and guests.

programme.title: News Breakfast (2026) - EP 119
programme.desc: As each day begins get the facts you need to stay informed. James Glenday and Emma Rebellato present the latest news, overnight developments and today's top stories, joined by Catherine Murphy, Nate Byrne and Lillian Rangiah.

programme.title: News Breakfast (2026) - EP 119
programme.desc: As each day begins get the facts you need to stay informed. James Glenday and Emma Rebellato present the latest news, overnight developments and today's top stories, joined by Catherine Murphy, Nate Byrne and Lillian Rangiah.

programme.title: ABC News Mornings (2026) - EP 119

programme.title: ABC News At Noon (2026) - EP 119
programme.desc: The leading news at lunchtime. Ros Childs brings you the day's top stories and the latest news as it unfolds, with reporters in the community across Australia and around the world reporting on the issues that matter to you.

programme.title: Australian Story (2026) - EP 17
programme.desc: In 2026, Logie-award-winning documentary program Australian Story celebrates 30 years sharing compelling stories about real people that illuminate, entertain and inspire. The power of the personal. Presented by Leigh Sales.

programme.title: Back Roads S12 - EP 3
programme.desc: Guest Presenter Myf Warhurst travels to the Victorian goldfields town of Eldorado, where the locals like to do things differently - from living in teepees, to composting human manure!

programme.title: Dreaming Big S1 - EP 5
programme.desc: Dreaming Big is a documentary about gifted Aboriginal and Torres Strait Islander youths on the cusp of becoming Australia's next generation of sports stars.

programme.title: Play On S2 - EP 3
programme.desc: In episode three, Play On features a former Sri Lankan test cricketers now living and coaching in Australia, and we look at the boom in semi-professional Ice Hockey down under - featuring a Japanese goalie and American star.

programme.title: Gardening Australia S37 - EP 17
programme.desc: Inspiring, entertaining and full of practical advice, join Costa Georgiadis and the team as they unearth gardening ideas, meet avid gardeners and look at some of the most inspiring gardens from across the country.

programme.title: Landline (2026) - EP 17

programme.title: Enlighten Your Life (S3) - EP 4
programme.desc: Today's theme is "Gallery vs. Natural" interiors. We'll be showcasing homes that highlight the contrast between the bold gallery style and the serene natural aesthetic.

programme.title: My Husband's Other Wife
programme.desc: Young mother Kelli discovers that husband Ty is secretly married to another woman. Kelli threatens to file charges, but when Ty dies suddenly she suspects he's faked his death and is planning to kill her.

programme.desc: Fired from the Anti-Villain League, Gru finds himself in a major identity crisis until the appearance of a mysterious stranger reminds him how good it feels to be bad.

programme.title: The National Dog Show ('20)
programme.desc: From the Kennel Club of Philadelphia, this cherished competition for all dog lovers returns for the 17th year. Hosted by John O'Hurley, the event features 2,000 of the nation's leading canines, including the world's largest, smallest and most exotic. Over 170 breeds strut their stuff with the hope of becoming this year's top dog. "The Dean" David Frei provides expert show commentary, and Mary Carillo chimes in as an adept sideline reporter for this ultimate canine showdown.

programme.title: Squirrel Boy S2 - EP 23
programme.desc: Leon's through with living in the wild and wants to be a pet.

programme.title: Squirrel Boy S2 - EP 24
programme.desc: Archie the rabbit believes he's found an ally in Salty Mike.

programme.title: Squirrel Boy S2 - EP 25
programme.desc: Rodney is having more trouble with Cousin Eddie and seeks advice from Grandpa Squirrel.

programme.title: Squirrel Boy S2 - EP 26
programme.desc: Stan the exterminator is back and he mistakes Leon for the Giant Wall Rat of Sumatra.

programme.title: Sesame Street S55 - EP 25
programme.desc: Casey Chameleon joins Elmo, Gabrielle, and Grover's game of hide and seek.

programme.title: Sesame Street S55 - EP 26

programme.title: Camp Lazlo S1 - EP 11
programme.desc: Lazlo organizes a dance with the Squirrel Scouts so that Lumpus can spend time with Jane Doe, but when the big night arrives, Lumpus is so nervous that his body literally explodes from fear.

programme.title: Camp Lazlo S1 - EP 12
programme.desc: Lumpus discovers that Clam is not only a child genius, but he's also Lumpus' meal ticket to a life of fame and fortune!

programme.title: Camp Lazlo S1 - EP 13
programme.desc: When Edward excludes Lazlo from his secret club, Lazlo creates his own club out of nothing!

programme.title: Camp Lazlo S1 - EP 14
programme.desc: The Bean Scouts feel lousy because they don't have horses, but that all changes when Lazlo calls in a spitting llama who reminds them all it's okay to be a misfit.

programme.title: Camp Lazlo S1 - EP 15
programme.desc: When the Jelly Beans lose their new pet snake in their cabin, Patsy shows up to save the campers from being swallowed one by one by the vicious little garter snake.

programme.desc: A letter to the editor makes Jake think that Adam is considering leaving CDMS. In an effort to make Adam feel more welcome, he and his friends set out to become more human.

programme.title: My Gym Partner's A Monkey S4 - EP 25
programme.desc: Jake's wish to live in a real live musical comes true, after he knocks the wish granting 'David Coppertrout' out of the Central Stream.

programme.desc: Grindelwald escapes custody and Albus Dumbledore enlists his former student Newt Scamander, who agrees to help, unaware of the dangers that lie ahead.

programme.title: Closing Bell - EP 1
programme.desc: Anything can happen between the bells of the trading day. But what happens during the last hour could be what matters most. The show takes a close-up look at how the markets are moving, what’s driving them and how investors are reacting.

programme.title: Closing Bell: Overtime - EP 1
programme.desc: When the bell rings, the action does not end. "Closing Bell: Overtime" takes you through all of the after-hours moves including breaking news, corporate earnings and post-market trading. Big investors, smart strategists and top money managers debate actionable ideas and the big market themes of the day, and get viewers ready for tomorrow’s trading day.

programme.title: The Mysterious Rise of China's Desert AI Hubs
programme.desc: A Bloomberg investigation found China is building a small city of AI data centers in a remote desert and looking to buy 115,000 of Nvidia’s best chips to power them despite a US export ban.

programme.title: A Dangerous Corner of the Global Shipping Industry
programme.desc: The sinking of the Gulf Livestock 1 was the worst disaster in the history of the live-export trade, an industry made up of about 150 ships with a market value totaling $20 billion to $30 billion.

programme.desc: Hannah Fry journeys to Ireland, her ancestral homeland, tracing the impact of the nation's modern economic transformation and its connections to the land and sea.

programme.title: The Infinite Explorer with Hannah Fry S1 - EP 5

programme.title: The Infinite Explorer with Hannah Fry S1 - EP 6
programme.desc: Hannah Fry travels to Spain to decode its history and culture. She learns about the rhythms of flamenco, a mountain whistle language and the hidden symbolism in its urban planning.

programme.desc: Experts give advice to the questions and troubles from viewers about child-rearing.

programme.title: Gretel's Magical Oven
programme.desc: Each week, a particular sweet and its recipe will be introduced along with various topics about the sweet.

programme.title: An Unlikely Pair Hits the Road (R)
programme.desc: Two people who live in "different worlds" ― one physically impaired and unimpaired ― and who have never met before, embark on a journey of three days and two nights. Will their world expand? This documentary provides an opportunity to think about diversity.

programme.title: French in a Happy Mood
programme.desc: Let’s learn simple and easy-to-remember phrases, looking at a modern Europe that cherishes its history and traditions while pursuing a lifestyle that fits its stature. Furthermore, we explore tips for "happiness" and various forms of "joy" through the unique European way of thinking and values behind their languages and lifestyles.

programme.title: Real-Life Travel English
programme.desc: This program is a practical listening course designed to help you understand fast-paced real English that you encounter when traveling abroad.

programme.title: World Weather
programme.desc: Weather information of the different areas around the world.

programme.title: Kid's Discovery (R)
programme.desc: In this program, children around the age of 4 can experience the pleasure of playing with friends, the wonder of life, the joy of doing thigs by themselves, and consideration for others, all while having fun through various discoveries.

programme.title: With Mother (R)
programme.desc: This children's program includes a puppet show, cartoon, music, and gymnastics in which children can participate.

programme.title: See, Learn, Explore--A Deep Travelogue in Tohoku
programme.desc: Explore the unknown charms of the Tohoku region of northern Japan.

programme.title: Drama Serial "The Scent of the Wind" Ep. 56 (R)
programme.desc: The 114th drama serial follows two women, Rin (Mikami Ai) and Naomi (Kosaka Juri), who paved the way for nursing in the Meiji era. Each carries her own struggles, yet together they support one another as they race to protect the wounded and vulnerable, often standing up against powerful forces. Through conflicts and hardships, the two gradually grow. No matter which way the wind blows, this unconventional duo continues their journey in search of happiness.

programme.title: ETV Special "Hibakusha: The Path to Nuclear Abolition" (R)
programme.desc: Tomonaga Masao, a hibakusha and physician, has long studied the effects of radiation while advocating for nuclear abolition. As global nuclear tensions rise once again, he travels to the United States with fellow hibakusha to call for a world free of nuclear weapons. Their mission is to engage in dialogue with people holding different views. In Los Alamos, a center of nuclear development, they meet with researchers, and in Pearl Harbor, they attend a memorial ceremony and encounter survivors.

programme.title: TV Exercise
programme.desc: Short program to introduce physical exercise for the young and old.

programme.title: Health for Today
programme.desc: Difficult to understand medical care is easily explained in this program as well as tips on healthcare.

programme.title: My Gardening
programme.desc: Learn useful tips on gardening.

programme.title: Kyoto's Hidamariya Garden Shop
programme.desc: Offering tips on growing flowers and greens through an animated short story.

programme.title: Drama Serial "Massan" Encore Ep. 119
programme.desc: Masaharu (Tamayama Tetsuji), who travels alone to Scotland to learn the art of whisky making, meets Ellie (Charlotte Kate Fox) and falls in love. Masaharu dreams of creating Japan’s first domestically produced whisky, while Ellie, who has left her homeland and come to Japan for the first time, faces a series of challenges. This is the story of love and adventure as Massan and Ellie, united by the strength of their bond, through a turbulent era with unwavering resolve.

programme.title: What the Villains Have to Say (R)
programme.desc: Cockroaches, Carbon dioxide, Unwanted hair... Villains are anathema to the public as being "dirty, noxious, and ugly." But even villains have a point they want you to hear! In this program, we look at their amazing abilities revealed by the latest research, as well as the real villains, who are actually a little bit fascinating!

programme.title: Bosai: Science That Can Save Your Life

programme.title: Impacts: Climates Change the World
programme.desc: The key to global warming may lie underground: soil contains far more carbon than the atmosphere, but overdevelopment of farmland releases it as CO2. We explore efforts to capture carbon in the soil.

programme.title: Time-Lapse Japan
programme.desc: Tanaka Isson had a unique gift for portraying Amami Oshima's nature in art. A child prodigy, his career faltered until he moved to the island. Time-lapse footage hints at scenes that inspired him.

programme.title: A Different Kind of Fish

programme.title: Ukiyo-e Edo-Life
programme.desc: The Bird Cafe: We visit an Edo-style open-air teahouse where townspeople enjoyed refreshments, conversation, and the company of exotic birds - for them, these outings were about more than a good time.

programme.title: Girl Power - EP 715
programme.desc: Invite stylish men from all over the world to share cultural differences, feelings and values, and life experiences with Taiwanese!

programme.title: Hello Doctor - EP 1420
programme.desc: The program invites doctors from different fields to talk about big and small things about doctors, break the stereotype of doctors and provide audiences with information on medical health from a relaxed and pleasant perspective!

programme.title: Wassup Man! Let's Chill! Let' Go Play! - EP 57
programme.desc: A trip without a purpose, just go on a whim, so simple, are you willing to join us? A journey that witnesses the friendship of men begins!Let's go! Bring a simple bag, ride a hot-blooded motorcycle, and have fun traveling and charging.

programme.title: Dee Girls Talk - EP 516
programme.desc: Hosted by Dee Hsu, the most queenly artist in the entertainment industry, and partnered with the humorous assistant host Patrick, each episode invites many of the most popular and topical artists and Internet celebrities to appear on the show. Through Dee Hsu Her profound and spicy hosting skills stirred up unparalleled "laughter" with the guests.

programme.title: No.57 Dream Boulevard - EP 1986
programme.desc: More professional, richer, and more diversified car model information is shared with the audience.

programme.title: Have Fun Together - EP 101
programme.desc: A star-studded, cross-generational travel reality show that documents the unforgettable friendship journey of artists from different generations!

programme.title: All Star Quiz Show - EP 99
programme.desc: The puzzle reality program, with the curator Sam Tseng as the knowledge gatekeeper, tests every artist star who comes to challenge the Jiugongge puzzle game. If you want to conquer the Jiugongge level, through creative association, logical reasoning, and rational analysis, you will have the opportunity to obtain wisdom stars and take away the dream prize.

programme.title: ANGELS OF MISSION - EP 19
programme.desc: Three fearless women in the Counter-Terrorism Unit (CTU) tackle terrorist threats, criminal schemes and high-risk undercover missions. As they confront danger on the job, they also face love and betrayal, testing their courage and friendship in a world where trust can be deadly.

programme.title: The Airport Diary II & What's On Today - EP 1
programme.desc: The Airport Diary II is set against the evolving Hong Kong International Airport. It follows airport staff across different roles as they face work challenges, growth and teamwork in a fast-paced environment.

programme.title: Lo And Behold - EP 2829
programme.desc: Hung Shu-Kan owns a logistics business. The only thing on his mind is the well-being of his three daughters. His eldest daughter has moved abroad, but his second youngest daughter, Yuek-Shui, is still single. She and her little sister Sum-Yue often squabble, putting their father in a dilemma.

programme.desc: Big City Shop introduces viewers to the latest products on fashion, skin care, make-up, health care, baby care and much more!

programme.title: Lo And Behold - EP 2830
programme.desc: Hung Shu-Kan owns a logistics business. The only thing on his mind is the well-being of his three daughters. His eldest daughter has moved abroad, but his second youngest daughter, Yuek-Shui, is still single. She and her little sister Sum-Yue often squabble, putting their father in a dilemma.

programme.title: Treasure At Dawn & What's On Today - EP 26
programme.desc: A young doctor who is wrongly accused in a deadly case sets out to uncover the truth behind a mysterious "Heavenly Book". Along the way, he teams up with a clever noblewoman and a witty performer as they investigate a web of secrets in Liangzhou.

programme.title: Pilgrimage of History
programme.desc: A travel-history program hosted by Tony Hung and Priscilla Wong, the show visits Rome, London, Paris, Cairo and more, blending on-location filming with AI re-creations of key historical moments.

programme.title: Dolce Vita 2021
programme.desc: Life in Hong Kong is vibrant and diverse. This lifestyle show combines diverse themes, exploring different areas in each episode and inviting elites from various industries to share their secrets to success.

programme.title: The Joy Of Nature
programme.desc: Taiwan's camping destinations are breathtaking! Our hosts embark on a nature-themed healing trip, traversing Nantou, Kaohsiung, Taoyuan and other locations, delving into the Miaoli mountains, trying out forest cabins, luxury campervans, deluxe tents and more!

programme.title: Big Boys Club
programme.desc: Each episode of Big Boys Club invites singers, artistes as well as people from different walks of life as guests onto the show, participating in relaxed interviews and discussing current trends.

programme.title: Sword and Fairy 1 - EP 24
programme.desc: Adapted from game Chinese Paladin, the story follows Li Xiaoyao, a waiter with hero dreams, and Zhao Ling'er, a descendant of Nuwa. They face challenges in search of the Spirit Pearl, courageously embarking on a journey to save the world.

programme.title: News At 18:30 & Global View & What's On Today
programme.desc: Bringing you the news from Hong Kong, the mainland and around the world every evening at 6:30pm.

programme.title: Scoop 2026
programme.desc: This programme goes hot on the heels of the biggest happenings in society and the entertainment scene, bringing you the latest scoops.

programme.desc: The Airport Diary II is set against the evolving Hong Kong International Airport. It follows airport staff across different roles as they face work challenges, growth and teamwork in a fast-paced environment.

programme.title: News Roundup
programme.desc: Reporting major news from Hong Kong, across the Taiwan Strait, and around the world, keeping you informed about important events as well as updates in the world of sports.

programme.title: The Fading Gold - EP 16
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Ko Sham is assaulted by some knife-wielding assailant. Fortunately, Lam Ching reaches the scene in a car and comes to his rescue. programme.title: Strange Tales of Tang Dynasty III to Changan - EP 13
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Amid Chang'an's power shifts, Lu Lingfeng and Su Wuming lead their detective team back to the capital, turning a teahouse into a covert base. programme.title: Treasures Around - EP 23
programme.desc: The quirky and clever Shan Dandan (Xu Lu), who dreams of becoming a jade appraiser, crosses paths with Pei Pei (Bi Wen Jun), the wayward heir to a jade business. Initially at odds, the two develop a love-hate relationship as they face challenges together.

programme.title: Golden City (Ep 901-950) VVD Mandarin - EP 907
programme.desc: Set in the 60s in Jioufen, the story tells how three sworn brothers conquer the world with their bare hands. While connecting romance from the previous generation to the shared emotions with the present, the drama explores differences in generational valu

programme.title: Country Spirit - EP 13
programme.desc: KOO SAI LUNG (CHUN PUI) is the manager of a wine factory. He adopts his ex-girlfriend’s illegitimate son, SHUNG (LAM KA TUNG), out of kindness. SHUNG is cheerful and tolerates any kind of abuse. LUNG’s sister, YIU (TANG SHUI MAN), loves SHUNG. However, she cannot forget her former love KOU (TSANG WAI KUEN) who is dead.

programme.title: The Driving Power - EP 9
programme.desc: MUI (CHENG SIU CHOW, ADAM) is a middle-aged man who has never had a proper job. Throughout his life, he has been relying on his family and living like a playboy. His biggest achievements are marrying a singer, YUNG (YIP TUNG, CECILIA) and raising their daughter CHU (YE MICHELLE). MUI and YUNG love each other very much even after being married for more than 20 years. However, deep down, MUI is still a playboy.

programme.title: Treasure of Destiny - EP 21
programme.desc: Pork butcher stall lady boss Chu Ying-kiu (Katy Kung) has innate mystical power. But she is inflicted with some strange illness that causes her to grow a beard. She hopes to find the elixir mentioned in Sutra of Forty-two Chapters for treating her illness. Over the years, university Chinese language professor Cheung King (Moses Chan) has been passionate about finding this legendary treasure. However, he has been suffering from insomnia as he was devastated in an incident.

programme.title: Guts of Man - EP 2
programme.desc: TUNG FEI (CHAN KIN FUNG, SAMMUL) ignores his late father’s last will and sneaks out of the Taohua Village, where he grew up, without his sister LAM’s (KOI MING FAI, JOYCE) knowing it. He meets a fisherman’s son SHEUNG FOON (NG CHEUK HAI, RON) on the way. He and FOON travel to the Qiantang River to see the tides. They meet a tycoon’s daughter YING HIU SUET (CHO, MANDY LEE) and FEI falls in love with her at first sight.

programme.title: Brother's Keeper II - EP 25
programme.desc: Overcoming adversity, LAW WAI-SHUN (Edwin Siu) and YIU MAN-YING (Kristal Tin) successfully develop the business of Lo Son Kei and make it famous in both Hong Kong and Macau. However, their success upsets a junket promoter-turned-land developer, KO TIN-TSAU (Hugo Ng), who keeps suppressing them. WAI-SHUN is even betrayed by his close confidant TSU CHI-LIK (Mat Yeung).

programme.title: Brother's Keeper II - EP 26
